mapper.insert: INSERT INTO federated_stats_task (task_name, project_id, stats_type, algorithm_type, task_state, task_param, created_by) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{projectId}, #{statsType}, #{algorithmType}, 0, #{taskParam}, #{createdBy})
INSERT INTO federated_stats_result (task_id, result_type, result_data, result_file, row_count) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{resultType}, #{resultData}, #{resultFile}, #{rowCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM federated_stats_result WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at
SELECT r.* FROM federated_stats_result r JOIN federated_stats_task t ON r.task_id = t.id WHERE t.created_by = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO federated_stats_config (config_name, storage_type, storage_path, connection_json, is_default, created_by) VALUES (#{configName}, #{storageType}, #{storagePath}, #{connectionJson}, #{isDefault}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM federated_stats_config WHERE is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
